resources.string: Android Agent Tools accessibility service for UI automation. This service allows the agent to interact with the screen, perform gestures, and retrieve UI information.

Press Start Server to begin.

WiFi: Connect to same network as your computer.
USB: Use ADB port forwarding.

HTTP Server is running.

WiFi: curl http://[phone-ip]:8080/mcp/tools/list
USB: adb forward tcp:8080 tcp:8080
 curl http://localhost:8080/mcp/tools/list

Requires Accessibility Service for UI tools.
